subject:
Tomograms reconstruction in Warp after Relion 4.0 Tomo frame
 alignment
body:
Dear all,

Is it possible to feed improved information from Relion 4.0 tomo frame 
alignment into Warp (or any other) to reconstruct tomograms more precisely? 
I am trying to improve fiducial-less tomogram reconstruction.

Thanks for any tips!

Best,
Piotr
